title: Kasane Teto SUN and MOON
description:
Simple Kasane Teto Sun & Kasane Teto Moon Pack
This texture pack replaces the sun and moon with custom versions, giving the sky a fresh kasane teto.

✅ Compatible with Minecraft 1.17 to 1.21.4
✅ Made for Fabric
✅ No Optifine required
✅ Works with other tex
body:
Simple Kasane Teto Sun & Kasane Teto Moon Pack
This texture pack replaces the sun and moon with custom versions, giving the sky a fresh kasane teto.

✅ Compatible with Minecraft 1.17 to 1.21.4
✅ Made for Fabric
✅ No Optifine required
✅ Works with other texture packs
